title: USD/JPY — Intervention Watch
text: USD/JPY at 158.71 — 160.00 remains the key level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: AUD/USD — RBA Hike vs Retail Positioning
text: RBA hiking rates — AUD carry supported; AUD/USD at 0.7179. Retail positioning extreme: 88% short, contrarian reversal risk.

title: EUR/USD — CB Differential
text: Fed 3.75% (ON HOLD) vs ECB 2% (ON HOLD) — 175bp spread supports USD; EUR/USD at 1.1791.

title: GBP/USD — Positioning + Vol
text: GBP LF net long, AM constructive — positioning aligned; ATM IV 9.5% slightly above HV, 25d RR near flat — no directional conviction in options. Pair at 1.354.

title: Cross-Asset Correlation Break
text: USD/JPY vs VIX correlation break: corr=+0.647 vs norm=+0.144 (z=+1.29σ) — JPY no longer acting as safe haven; carry position at 158.71 not attracting risk-off unwind.
